member.name: M:MSStore.CLI.Services.EnvironmentInfo.GetEnvironmentInfo
member.summary: Gets the cached environment information. This method computes the environment data only once.
member.returns: A dictionary containing environment information with "Source" key indicating the detected CI/CD environment.

member.name: M:MSStore.CLI.Services.EnvironmentInfo.ComputeEnvironmentInfo
member.summary: Computes the environment information by detecting CI/CD environment variables. This method is called only once when the lazy value is first accessed.
member.returns: A dictionary containing the computed environment information.
